description: Data engineering operations CLI for ClickHouse Cloud organizations, services, ClickPipes, backups, private endpoints, usage, and observability.

novel_features.name: Cloud service inventory
novel_features.description: List ClickHouse Cloud services for an organization so data teams can inventory warehouses, inspect state, and route follow-up service operations.

novel_features.name: ClickPipes operations
novel_features.description: Inspect ClickPipes ingestion pipelines, scaling state, reverse private endpoints, and CDC scaling from the same generated command surface.

novel_features.name: Usage and observability
novel_features.description: Fetch organization usage-cost records plus Prometheus endpoints for service-level monitoring and cost review workflows.
